completion_promises.evidence: Created src/jarvis/agents/subagent_registry.py with the public function build_async_subagents(config: JarvisConfig) -> list[AsyncSubAgent]; module __all__ exports it. Tests TestAC001PublicFactory.test_module_exports_build_async_subagents and test_returns_list pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Returns a list of exactly one element.
completion_promises.evidence: build_async_subagents returns [spec] where spec is a single AsyncSubAgent dict. TestAC002SingleElement.test_returns_single_entry asserts len(result) == 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The element satisfies: name == 'jarvis-reasoner'; graph_id == 'jarvis_reasoner'; description is non-empty.
completion_promises.evidence: _REASONER_NAME='jarvis-reasoner' and _REASONER_GRAPH_ID='jarvis_reasoner' module constants populate the spec; _REASONER_DESCRIPTION is a multi-line non-empty string. TestAC003CoreFields verifies all three fields.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Description must contain ALL of the following substrings (routing signals): gpt-oss-120b, on the premises, sub-second, two to four minutes, critic, researcher, planner.
completion_promises.evidence: _REASONER_DESCRIPTION embeds every required substring verbatim. TestAC004RequiredRoutingSignals.test_description_contains_required_substrings asserts each is present and reports any missing ones.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Description must NOT contain any of: deep_reasoner, adversarial_critic, long_research, quick_local, cloud-tier promises — asserted by TASK-J003-020 regression test (Context A concern #3).
completion_promises.evidence: Description copy was authored fresh and contains none of the four-roster legacy names or the substring 'cloud'. TestAC005ForbiddenTokensAbsent.test_description_excludes_forbidden_substrings checks each forbidden token (case-insensitive).

completion_promises.criterion_text: AsyncSubAgent is imported from deepagents (0.5.3 TypedDict); no redefinition.
completion_promises.evidence: subagent_registry.py performs `from deepagents import AsyncSubAgent` and re-exports the same symbol. TestAC006UsesDeepAgentsAsyncSubAgent asserts identity with deepagents.AsyncSubAgent both on first import and after importlib.reload.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Function is pure — given the same config, returns the same description text (deterministic for Graphiti trace-richness).
completion_promises.evidence: Description is a module-level constant string; build_async_subagents only constructs and returns the spec dict. TestAC007Deterministic asserts repeated calls with the same JarvisConfig produce equal results, and that two distinct fresh configs produce equal results too.

completion_promises.criterion_text: src/jarvis/agents/subagents/__init__.py re-exports the jarvis_reasoner.graph symbol so langgraph.json can bind jarvis_reasoner by module path.
completion_promises.evidence: Updated src/jarvis/agents/subagents/__init__.py to `from jarvis.agents.subagents.jarvis_reasoner import graph` and added 'graph' to __all__. TestAC008GraphReExport asserts subagents_pkg.graph is the same object as jarvis_reasoner.graph and that 'graph' is in __all__.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No LLM calls; no I/O beyond reading config.
completion_promises.evidence: build_async_subagents only reads config.supervisor_model for a debug log line and constructs a TypedDict; it never invokes init_chat_model or create_deep_agent. TestAC009NoNetworkAtBuildTime patches both and asserts neither is called from build_async_subagents itself.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: `ruff check` returns 'All checks passed!' for the new and modified files; `ruff format` reports zero changes after the test file was reformatted. Full pytest run (1296+ tests) passes with exit 0.
